mapper.select:
select d.*, (select count(1) from fp_metric_implementation i where i.tenant_id = d.tenant_id and i.metric_definition_id = d.id) as implementation_count from fp_metric_definition d
order by d.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from fp_metric_definition where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
select count(1) from fp_metric_definition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and enabled = true
select count(1) from fp_metric_definition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and mapping_json is not null and mapping_json != ''
select count(distinct object_type) from fp_metric_definition where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_metric_definition (id, tenant_id, metric_code, metric_name, metric_category, object_type, value_unit, value_precision, mapping_json, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{metricCode}, #{metricName}, #{metricCategory}, #{objectType}, #{valueUnit}, #{valuePrecision}, #{mappingJson}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from fp_metric_definition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
